title: Create: Classic Ores (PACP)
description: Programmer Art Continuation Project styled ores for Create, Create Addons, and Mods with Create Support.
body: An unofficial extension of the Programmer Art Continuation Project that rextures the ores in Create and a few Create Addons to fit the style. Currently supported mods are: Create, VS2 Clockwork, Create: The Factory Must Grow, Create: Dreams & Desires, Create: Crafts & (More) Additions, Create: Nuclear, Create: Northstar - Redux, Create: Destroy, Create: New Age, Create: CROWNS, Create: Ironworks, Create: Love and War, and Create: The Air War (CURSEFORGE EXCLUSIVE MOD). There is also support for the following mods: Oreganized, Oreganized: Carcinogenius, Etcetera, Alex's Caves, and Salt. Support for more Create Mod Addons will come in future.
